reportQuickFlow.title: SACH MAP Quick Report - 4 Steps
reportQuickFlow.description: A clean and user-friendly reporting flow for all citizens.
reportQuickFlow.aiGeneratedNotice: The content is AI-generated from your image and can be edited before submission.
reportQuickFlow.step1Hint: Capture a photo now or upload an existing violation image.
reportQuickFlow.step2Hint: Location is detected automatically, then fine-tuned using the mini map picker.
reportQuickFlow.step3Hint: AI suggests title and description based on the uploaded image.
reportQuickFlow.step4Hint: Select a violation type, confirm submission, and receive a unique tracking ID.

mapExperience.title: SACH MAP - Interactive Environmental Map
mapExperience.description: Track reports, pollution hotspots, and processing progress in real time.

hero.kicker: Agentic AI for urban environmental governance
title: SẠCH MAP
helps cities
act faster
hero.description: Transform scattered community reports into structured, actionable urban solutions. Real-time monitoring, AI-powered classification, and automated escalation for violations.

problem.title: Environmental violations go unaddressed
problem.description: Communities report problems, but without structured data and coordination, violations slip through the cracks.

stats.label: Average Response Time
stats.note: Before action is taken on violations

challenges.title: Scattered Reports
challenges.description: Community reports come through multiple channels with inconsistent formats

challenges.title: No Classification
challenges.description: Critical violations lack structured categorization and priority tagging

challenges.title: Manual Coordination
challenges.description: Routing to authorities and tracking requires manual effort and oversight

challenges.title: No Intelligence
challenges.description: Reports are not analyzed for patterns, trends, or emerging risks

bento.title: The Green Agent Ecosystem
bento.description: Four pillars working together to transform environmental governance from reactive to proactive, from manual to automated.

items.title: Autonomous Observation
items.description: Continuously monitors community reports, social media, and embedded signals for environmental violations.

items.title: Reasoning & Planning
items.description: Analyzes patterns, classifies severity, and determines the best response strategy.

items.title: Automated Action
items.description: Creates escalations, notifies authorities, and sends community feedback in real time.

items.title: Smart Escalation
items.description: Routes critical issues to the right agencies and tracks resolution progress.

workflow.title: The Agentic Cycle
workflow.description: Continuous monitoring and coordinated response through agentic intelligence

stages.title: Observe
stages.description: Analyze incoming community reports, sensor data, and environmental signals

stages.title: Plan
stages.description: Reason about violations, determine severity, and decide the action strategy

stages.title: Act
stages.description: Execute escalations, notify authorities, and send notifications to the community

stages.title: Monitor
stages.description: Track resolution progress and measure response effectiveness

stages.title: Escalate
stages.description: Ensure critical cases reach appropriate decision-makers

benefits.title: Speed
benefits.description: Issues resolved in hours, not days

benefits.title: Consistency
benefits.description: Every report handled by the same standards

benefits.title: Scalability
benefits.description: Handles 1000+ reports with the same quality
